message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 2018","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13141","justification":"ALLBUS 2018 includes detailed measures on political behaviour and attitudes, social inequality, minorities and national identity for Germany in the late 2010s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 2016","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12643","justification":"Covers political attitudes, social stratification, minority-related questions and identity topics in Germany mid‑2010s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 2014","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12010","justification":"Provides German data on political behaviour, equality/inequality, social exclusion and groups in the early‑to‑mid 2010s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 2012","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11564","justification":"National survey in Germany with modules on political attitudes, social stratification and group-related issues in the early 2010s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 2010","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11040","justification":"Includes indicators for political behaviour, social inequality and group attitudes in Germany at the start of the 2010s."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2013 – Pre- and Post-election Cross-Section","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12006","justification":"Focuses on political behaviour and attitudes in the 2013 federal election; includes variables on social groups and perceptions of inequality in Germany."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2017 – Pre- and Post-election Cross-Section","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12953","justification":"National election study with extensive political behaviour measures; also captures group attitudes, minorities and political conflict over inequality in Germany in the late 2010s."},{"title":"Immigration and Integration in Germany 2014","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12216","justification":"Survey on attitudes towards immigrants and integration in Germany; directly addresses minorities, social exclusion and national identity in the 2010s."},{"title":"Immigration and Integration in Germany 2016","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12638","justification":"Follows up on German attitudes to immigration and minorities after the 2015 refugee inflow; closely linked to political attitudes, exclusion and national identity."},{"title":"Religion and National Identity (Germany) 2010","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10050","justification":"German survey on religion, cultural and national identity with group-related and minority dimensions at the beginning of the 2010s."}]}
